\tzpentry{ID5633}{Curvature Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5633 introduces Curvature Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} e^{i\kappa \sin(\omega_m t)} = \sum_{n\in\mathbb{Z}} J_n(\kappa)\,e^{i n \omega_m t}, \label{eq:jacobi_anger} \end{equation}
